name: Frolic Classic Mouthpiece
summary: Direct-fit straight mouthpiece for the Frolic Thermal Extractor, designed for users who prefer a simple, unrestricted draw with minimal upkeep.
description: Direct-fit straight mouthpiece for the Frolic Thermal Extractor, designed for users who prefer a simple, unrestricted draw with minimal upkeep. The Frolic Standard Mouthpiece is a straightforward accessory engineered for reliable, everyday use with the Frolic Thermal Extractor. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
